title: I’ve been gaming with 8BitDo's Xbox mobile controller grip and I’ve never used my Game Pass subscription more
summary: The 8BitDo Ultimate Mobile Gaming Controller - Xbox Edition takes the brand’s existing wireless mobile controller grip and makes a couple of surface-level changes. The problems start when you step outside cloud gaming and into native mobile titles.
